headline: Disney World's Top Rival Needs a Better Sophomore Season
summary: Epic Universe is now a year old. It needs to avoid the terrible twos.

headline: Will Warren Buffett Return As Berkshire Hathaway’s CEO?
summary: Warren Buffett has a great deal to worry about at Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B). Among them is that his net worth has dropped by $5 billion this year to $146 billion, placing him behind Steve Ballmer and Jim Walton, both at $147 billion. He is one of the few people on the Bloomberg Billionaires list ... Will Warren Buffett Return As Berkshire Hathaway’s CEO?

headline: These 3 Underperforming Dow Stocks Have 3 Things in Common but Wall Street Remains Bullish
summary: Three of the Dow’s worst performers this year share more than just a red ticker. American Express (NYSE: AXP) trades at $310.66 versus a Wall Street target of $361.57. Nike (NYSE: NKE) trades at $42.98 against a consensus target of $60.49. Walt Disney (NYSE: DIS) changes hands at $99.71 with analysts modeling $129.67. The implied upside ... These 3 Underperforming Dow Stocks Have 3 Things in Common but Wall Street Remains Bullish
